title: Implement Meshtastic app text message ingress into LICHEN local interface
description: Why this exists: the MVP requires the standard app to send a message into LICHEN. What needs to be done: decode the app's text/send packet path, validate destination/channel semantics for the MVP, translate it to the LICHEN local message/CoAP interface or internal send API, and return a Meshtastic-compatible acknowledgement/error. Acceptance criteria: native_sim or host-side test sends a Meshtastic text packet and observes the expected LICHEN local message call; unsupported destinations/channels return explicit errors; payload length and encoding limits are enforced; no Meshtastic RF framing is transmitted over LoRa.
